title: Algebraic Structure, Equations, and Inequalities
description: Build a tariff and break-even calculator with piecewise constraints. Learners cumulatively produce an audited tariff and break-even model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Transform expressions and equations while stating domain restrictions and preserving equivalence.
Solve rational and radical equations and reject introduced or excluded solutions.
Model thresholds and distance with absolute-value and piecewise relationships.
